prompt: Create a spec for an actor that receives a PR diff and uses an LLM to generate a code review, then posts the review as GitHub comments. The actor should first analyze the diff to identify files worth reviewing, then spawn an LLM-based reviewer subagent for the actual review generation, and finally post the comments via the GitHub API.

assertions.text: Main spec has '# ... Actor Specification' title heading
Main spec uses 'Spawn the Subagent [Name](path)' pattern for LLM reviewer
Identifies the LLM step as delegated to a child actor (not done inline)
Creates a separate subagent spec file for the LLM reviewer
Has conditional branching for API failure handling
